_comment: Illustrative payer/PBM challenge for a specialty-medication prior auth. Keys are per-deployment placeholders; a live challenge carries base64url SPKI keys the relying party pins out of band. This challenge rides beside an NCPDP ePA/SCRIPT transaction and states what evidence the payer needs before it will rely on the request.

required.benefit_policy_hash: sha256:<payer formulary policy hash for this drug/plan>

accepted_registry_keys.public_key: <base64url SPKI: payer/PBM-pinned prescriber authority registry key>

notes.phi: EP-NCPDP-RX-PRIVACY-PROFILE-v1 applies: pairwise patient references, keyed source-record commitments, exact signed-artifact allowlists, and projected appeal bundles.
notes.denial: If the determination is a denial, signed_denial_required means an EP-RX-DENIAL-v1 (coded reason + keyed reason commitment + generic appeal route, signed by a pinned payer key) must be present for the denial to be relied on and appealed.
notes.runnable: See examples/ncpdp/specialty-pa-reliance-flow.mjs for a full offline flow against this challenge.
